'''âch-zh-zh''' ('''kachazhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preburn|preburn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preburn|preburn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhazh|thichazhazh]] || [[word:jichazhazh|jichazhazh]] || [[word:shichazhazh|shichazhazh]] || [[word:kichazhazh|kichazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhazh|thuthuchazhazh]] || [[word:jujuchazhazh|jujuchazhazh]] || [[word:shushuchazhazh|shushuchazhazh]] || [[word:kukuchazhazh|kukuchazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhazh|thuchazhazh]] || [[word:juchazhazh|juchazhazh]] || [[word:shuchazhazh|shuchazhazh]] || [[word:kuchazhazh|kuchazhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhazh|thuchazhazh]] || [[word:juchazhazh|juchazhazh]] || [[word:shuchazhazh|shuchazhazh]] || [[word:kuchazhazh|kuchazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhazh|thechazhazh]] || [[word:jechazhazh|jechazhazh]] || [[word:shechazhazh|shechazhazh]] || [[word:kechazhazh|kechazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhazh|thothochazhazh]] || [[word:jojochazhazh|jojochazhazh]] || [[word:shoshochazhazh|shoshochazhazh]] || [[word:kokochazhazh|kokochazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhazh|thochazhazh]] || [[word:jochazhazh|jochazhazh]] || [[word:shochazhazh|shochazhazh]] || [[word:kochazhazh|kochazhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhazh|thochazhazh]] || [[word:jochazhazh|jochazhazh]] || [[word:shochazhazh|shochazhazh]] || [[word:kochazhazh|kochazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchazhazh|thĂŠchazhazh]] || [[word:jĂŠchazhazh|jĂŠchazhazh]] || [[word:shĂŠchazhazh|shĂŠchazhazh]] || [[word:kĂŠchazhazh|kĂŠchazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhazh|thathachazhazh]] || [[word:jajachazhazh|jajachazhazh]] || [[word:shashachazhazh|shashachazhazh]] || [[word:kakachazhazh|kakachazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhazh|thachazhazh]] || [[word:jachazhazh|jachazhazh]] || [[word:shachazhazh|shachazhazh]] || [[word:kachazhazh|kachazhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhazh|thachazhazh]] || [[word:jachazhazh|jachazhazh]] || [[word:shachazhazh|shachazhazh]] || [[word:kachazhazh|kachazhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhazh|shachazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhazh|goshachazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhazh|gokishachazhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhazhnĂŒ|shachazhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnknĂŒ|goshachazhazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhnĂŒ|gokishachazhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhazhshĂ«|shachazhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkshĂ«|goshachazhazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhshĂ«|gokishachazhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhazhro|shachazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkro|goshachazhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhro|gokishachazhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhazhmu|shachazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkmu|goshachazhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhmu|gokishachazhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhazhsher|shachazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnksher|goshachazhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhsher|gokishachazhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhazhng|shachazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkng|goshachazhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhng|gokishachazhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhazhya|shachazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkya|goshachazhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhya|gokishachazhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhazhyam|shachazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkyam|goshachazhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhyam|gokishachazhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhazhnĂŒshĂ«|shachazhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachazhazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachazhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhazhnĂŒro|shachazhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnknĂŒro|goshachazhazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhnĂŒro|gokishachazhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhazhnĂŒmu|shachazhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnknĂŒmu|goshachazhazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhnĂŒmu|gokishachazhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shachazhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachazhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachazhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhazhshĂ«ro|shachazhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkshĂ«ro|goshachazhazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhshĂ«ro|gokishachazhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhazhshĂ«mu|shachazhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkshĂ«mu|goshachazhazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhshĂ«mu|gokishachazhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhazhronĂŒ|shachazhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkronĂŒ|goshachazhazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhronĂŒ|gokishachazhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhazhroshĂ«|shachazhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkroshĂ«|goshachazhazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhroshĂ«|gokishachazhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhazhromu|shachazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkromu|goshachazhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhromu|gokishachazhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhazhmunĂŒ|shachazhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkmunĂŒ|goshachazhazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhmunĂŒ|gokishachazhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhazhmushĂ«|shachazhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkmushĂ«|goshachazhazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhmushĂ«|gokishachazhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhazhmuro|shachazhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhazhnkmuro|goshachazhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhazhmuro|gokishachazhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
